content: The negation of $$\sim s \vee(\sim r \wedge s)$$ is equivalent to
explanation: $$\begin{aligned} & \text { } \sim(\sim s \vee(\sim r \wedge s)) \\ & \equiv s \wedge(\sim(\sim r \wedge s)) \equiv s \wedge(r \vee \sim s) \\ & \equiv(s \wedge r) \vee(s \wedge \sim s) \\ & \equiv(s \wedge r) \vee F \quad (\because s ~\wedge \sim s ~\text{is false})\\ & \equiv s \wedge r \end{aligned}$$
